Pre-Professional Education Courses

TLPL101

Inquiry Approach to Teaching STEM (Step 1)

Inquiry Teaching of STEM in Middle School

4. Middle School teacher candidates demonstrate understanding of learners and their social and cultural contexts with a global perspective and intentional sensitivity to other cultures. They are able to work with students, families, and communities in ways that reflect the dispositions expected of professional educators as delineated in professional (AMLE); state (MSDE); and, institutional standards. EDHD436
